# Allowlist of files that legitimately reference src/kailash/ source paths
# (the kailash-py SDK). These are global COC files that guide developers
# through provenance, compliance, and cross-SDK navigation. They legitimately
# reference kailash-py source paths even though this template serves
# Python/Ruby binding consumers of kailash-rs.
#
# CI validates .claude/ content doesn't contain src/kailash/ contamination
# EXCEPT in files listed here. One file path per line, relative to repo root.
# Lines starting with # are comments, blank lines ignored.
#
# Add a path here if a new skill/agent legitimately needs to reference
# kailash-py source (e.g., cross-SDK provenance, spec-compliance tracking).

# Cross-SDK navigation and provenance

.claude/rules/dataflow-identifier-safety.md
.claude/skills/30-claude-code-patterns/parallel-merge-workflow.md

.claude/skills/29-pact/pact-governance-engine.md
.claude/skills/02-dataflow/cache-cas-fail-closed.md

# VERSION changelog references specific SDK file fixes by path
.claude/VERSION

# (rule examples teaching SDK structure, hook scanning logic, and skill content
# that documents BUILD repo conventions for downstream developers)
